H1_feedback_driven_online_adaptation.evidence: feedback10 expert mean improves absolute CER by 0.024758 vs static and 0.004903 vs feedback20 mean; three-seed std 0.000790

H2_dynamic_expert_structure.evidence: test expert advantage over single is 0.000551 on the three-seed mean and the test revisit routes 99.8652% to expert0; validation calibration passes proxy separability but creates 8 experts, reuses the A1-dominant expert on only 42.3077% of A2, and worsens expert-vs-single revisit DoD by 0.049110 (95% CI 0.030511 to 0.068871)

H3_pollution_control_mechanism.evidence: 10% noise changes feedback10 CER by 0.000413; disabling rollback/reliability under feedback20 noise worsens CER only 0.000387/0.000760

supported: Sparse corrective feedback enables stable online adapter adaptation on the frozen Chinese VSR stream.
Feedback every 10 samples outperforms every 20 samples by about 0.0049 absolute CER on three-seed means.
The adapted model retains its gain on the revisited domain after static difficulty correction.
Observed 10 percent label corruption has negligible effect at the selected feedback10 operating point.
not_supported: Dynamic expert growth provides a material advantage over one adapter.
The current router learns meaningful domain-specialized expert reuse.
Reliability or rollback alone explains a large robustness gain.
Robustness generalizes beyond the tested 10 percent label-noise condition.
Validation-calibrated expert routing recovers reliable domain-specialized reuse.

next_code_research: Add router margin, entropy, prototype-distance and per-domain confusion diagnostics; write synthetic shift tests before changing routing thresholds.
Calibrate expert creation and routing only on a development stream, then rerun the fixed revisit protocol after a code-level routing change.
Add matched accepted-update-budget controls so feedback cadence is separated from total supervised-update count.
Promote fixed segment metrics and static-corrected forgetting into the repository analysis tool with regression tests.
Separate reliability filtering from rollback acceptance by supervision type and corruption status in logs and deterministic tests.

failed_reasons: expert-vs-single revisit difference-in-differences is worse, not at least 0.003 better
the paired interval is entirely in the worse direction

experiment_decision.reason: the validation proxy gate passed, but returning-A reuse and paired DoD gates failed decisively; no repaired-router test, additional expert seed, or sweep is allowed
